programme.desc: The team reflects on why this dark location soaked into their psyche.

programme.title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear
programme.desc: A caretaker beneath a metropolitan library protects magical artifacts from those who would use them to do evil.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: And the Crown of King Arthur
programme.desc: Someone is killing off potential Librarians and it's up to Flynn Carsen and his new Guardian, Colonel Eve Baird, to save the three that are left.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: And the Sword in the Stone
programme.desc: The Serpent Brotherhood is trying to return magic to the world; Flynn, Colonel Baird, and the potential Librarians must stop them before it's too late.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: And the Horns of a Dilemma
programme.desc: The librarians' first solo mission hits a snag when Baird loses the others in a mysterious labyrinth that magically exists below the skyscraper of a modern corporation.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When the Serpent Brotherhood wants to kill Santa, the librarians must rescue him and help him accomplish the secret purpose of Christmas.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When the dragons sleeping beneath the earth threaten to awaken and wreak havoc around the world, Flynn returns to help find their hidden treasure.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Librarians travel to a town where fairy tales are coming to life and attacking!

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The librarians are forced to intercede when a group of competitive high school students start undercutting each other with witchcraft.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: The Librarians and the Heart of Darkness
programme.desc: The librarians encounter the house behind the legend of all haunted houses and set out to destroy it.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: An investigation into a missing person uncovers what appears to be an alien invasion in a small town.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When Dulaque changes the course of fate, Baird begins moving through alternate timelines that reveal the changing destinies of the librarians.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Jenkins discovers there is something wrong with the library; the librarians are drawn together to solve the mystery of a massive storm that is parked over Manhattan.

programme.title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear
programme.desc: A caretaker beneath a metropolitan library protects magical artifacts from those who would use them to do evil.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Prospero summons other fictionals in order to retrieve parts of his staff; the librarians find themselves pitted against Frankenstein's monster and Sherlock Holmes' nemesis Moriarty; Flynn and Baird have a disagreement.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.sub-title: And What Lies Beneath the Stones
programme.desc: Stone, Cassandra and Ezekiel team up to investigate a cave-in at an oil rig site which has unleashed a shape-shifting god who grows in strength when lies are told.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When students begin disappearing at Wexler College, the librarians head out to investigate; Cassandra gets an offer that is difficult to turn down.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Flynn is kidnapped by a mysterious stranger with both amnesia and a collection of the library's missing artifacts; the group pursues the Staff of Zara-thustra.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Baird's old friend finds himself embroiled in a scandal in the form of a missing intern and a contract with the devil; Baird must battle for the souls of all the librarians.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: When people begin suffering the effects of accidents and sins in which they have not been involved, the team tracks the connection to Dorian Gray.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The team is sent to a high-tech research facility where the researchers have been turned into mindless monsters by a bizarre power source in the center's lab.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The team scatters and each person begins living the ideal version of their life; the appearance of Ariel brings everyone together to investigate.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The librarians discover that Prospero's magic is wreaking havoc with the technology of the world; Flynn and Baird must travel back to 1611, while the rest of the team battles Prospero in the present.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: The Egyptian God of Chaos inhabits a human, and tries to release pure evil into the world; the librarians must decipher clues in a science museum.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: Flynn leads the others on a rescue mission, which leads them into a subterranean trap filled with ancient Egyptian werewolves.

programme.title: The Librarians
programme.desc: A routine artifact retrieval becomes complicated when the artifact grafts itself to Cassandra; a blizzard forces Stone and Cassandra to take shelter at a mysterious hotel.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie explores Tunisia to meet traditional couscous makers, eat delicious street food, and get invited to cook with local chefs on a beach. Inspired by everything he sees, Jamie cooks crispy prawn parcels and a chicken and merguez sausage stew.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Frankie's got tricks and treats up his sleeve this Halloween with simple, wicked good dishes for all to enjoy.

programme.title: Struggle Meals
programme.desc: Boo! It's spooky season, and what better way to get into the spirit than with affordable, party-friendly Halloween dishes that scream trick or treat?! But be warned, these meals are scary good.

programme.title: Baking the Holidays
programme.desc: Whether you have kids or are a kid at heart, these whimsical Halloween treats are delicious, easy bakes. From leftover Halloween candy bark to ghosty treats and monster cakes. These recipes are perfect to make with little ones.

programme.title: Baking the Holidays
programme.desc: Join Mia for these Halloween cakes are sure to SCARE! Blood red velvet cake, marshmellow spiderwebs, bubbling claudrons and a cake that bites back will inspire some serious spooky vibes. Mia will seriously impress and teach you new skills.

programme.title: Baking the Holidays
programme.desc: Make your Halloween Party the talk of every boy and ghoul in the neighborhood! Whether it's the poisoned apples, the drippy candle cakes, coffin pies or savory treats (or tricks) - these delicious bakes will surely delight and scare.

programme.title: Halloween Candy Lovers Will Hate This Ranking
programme.desc: On this episode of Forking Delicious, it's Halloween, and you can't have tricks without the treats! It's a sugary smackdown as our panel of treat-loving tricksters count down your top 10 Halloween candies of all time!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates the one dish wonder of a casserole with a Cajun chicken tray bake and a vegetable lasagna.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.sub-title: Barbecue Chicken, Roast Potatoes and Corn
programme.desc: Jamie takes root veg to another level, makes scrumptious sticky BBQ chicken and turns things upside down with a pineapple cake.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Jarred Pepper Pasta and Sheet Pan Brisket
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy jarred-pepper pasta, crispy chicken in baked-bread sauce, and a beef brisket traybake - all prepped in minutes. He makes shelf-raid spiced haricot beans, and rounds it all off with a fast and simple strawberry & balsamic tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Creamy Chicken Pot Pie and Chocolate Tiramisu
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisù.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie shares a simple salmon dish perfect for a midweek meal, and some no-fuss fish cakes made from tins. He cooks a lamb Madras traybake, as well as a no-cook pasta sauce, and crowns it all off with a hot and crispy ice cream parcel!

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a speedy midweek chicken traybake. He shows us cool ways to upgrade salmon, knocks up a shelf-raid quesadilla toastie, and transforms a batch-cook Bolognese into cheesy bread bowls. All finished off with a super simple banoffee tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Fast & Simple
programme.sub-title: Smash Burger and Creamy Chicken with Mushrooms
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a midweek meal of speedy sweet pea chicken, a juicy Smash burger and a chicken and mushroom rice traybake. He batch-cooks his seven-veg sauce, followed by a spicy fish soup. And finishes off with a perfect pudding of tinned fruit granita.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie hacks his oven into a rotisserie for crispy chicken and chips and bakes a savory spinach and feta pie. Then, the Godfather of Spanish cuisine, Jose Pizarro, shares some gorgeous Mediterranean flavours using just 5 everyday ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie turns frozen fish and veggies into a time saving supper. Then, Italian chef, Gennaro Contaldo rustles up some delicious homemade gnocchi using just 5 easy ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.sub-title: Pantry Pasta and Rice Pudding Pops
programme.desc: Jamie raids his pantry for a speedy veggie carbonara and rice pudding popsicles.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 5 Ingredient Mediterranean Meals
programme.desc: Jamie's dressing a salad with a crown of cheese! He's also got a speedy twist on Sunday roast chicken and an elegant apple tart all with 5 fabulous ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.desc: Jamie kicks off autumn with Italian-inspired cheesy cabbage pasta and smoky sweetcorn burgers with feta. He shares tips for storing onions and saving tomato seeds, finishing with a beautiful tomato galette for a perfect fall meal.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Autumn's Harvest: Roast Chicken and Tarte Tatin
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a roast chicken with eggplant, bakes feta with figs & prosciutto, and creates a runner bean stew with fish. He shares tips for storing berries and chiles, finishing with a stunning pear tarte tatin.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons
programme.sub-title: Autumn's Last Bites: Squash Tagliatelle and Blackberry Cobbler
programme.desc: Jamie wraps up autumn with cheesy squash tagliatelle, a mushroom curry with crispy ginger rice, and celeriac remoulade. He forages for blackberries to make a cobbler, the perfect end to a crisp autumn day.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie tracks down some fast, fresh and easy recipes, featuring tasty minty pea tortiglioni and gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits the pizza capital of Italy to learn recipes from the locals and tries acquapazza, fish poached in crazy water.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits Basilicata in search of some old school Italian recipes and meets a family of shepherds and an 89-year-old macaroni master.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie gets a masterclass in Sicilian sweets and cooking up an epic tuna, prawn and pistachio spaghetti. There's also some chocolaty cannoli.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is taking spaghetti bolognese to the next level and re-creating a mind-blowing Jewish-Italian recipe. There's also beef stew with pappardelle.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie heads for one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, making hand-crafted pasta, a special seafood stew, and the region's answer to paella.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.sub-title: Best of Salina's Land and Sea
programme.desc: Jamie returns to cooking the food he loves the most, getting right to heart of the Italian kitchen.

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.desc: Eddie and Esperanza are looking for a home that'll cut down their commute. They're visiting some of the most desirable properties in Los Gatos, California. Will they find their dream home?

programme.title: Million Dollar Dream Home
programme.sub-title: Designing A New Life By The Beach
programme.desc: Arica, a designer, and Sean, a contractor, are relocating from San Francisco. They're visiting some of the most desirable properties in Orange County, California. It's important for them to be closer to the beach and have space for their future dogs.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A futuristic villa built on the edge of a lake in Austria. A cabin perched on the edge of a river. A unique beachside house built into the rock, and in rural England a modern mirrored house, designed to blend into and reflect its rural setting.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A striking modern home has been built out of flint, and then to Switzerland to see a sleek glass residence next to a scenic lake. Deep In the woods in New York State, a far-from-average tree house that serves as a dream getaway for a family of five.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: In the Cotswolds, UK, a unique home built into a lake. Lake Ontario, a home that resembles an ocean liner, and then to Portugal, where in land, a ruin has been transformed into a minimalist's dream with a pool concealed in the roof.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A 300-year-old Scottish ruin that's been brought back to life. In the Sierra Nevada mountain, an angular home built from zinc and glass. In Sardinia a stunning waterfront villa. And in Germany, a wartime bunker that lay abandoned for 70 years.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Homes
programme.desc: A Norwegian mountain cabin that is so remote it is only accessed by helicopter. A family retreat embedded into rocks in the Californian desert. In Brazil, an epic jungle lodge.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Kirsten works from the home office, while Joel is a sales representative with a make-shift workspace in their bedroom. To help this couple, Brian and Sarah look to the backyard for space to retrofit an old shipping container into an office.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Miriam and Mark are busy parents to four kids under 10 years old. To help these hardworking parents unwind, Brian and Sarah build them a parents-only hideaway in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Debbie, Kevin, and their three children are a newly-blended family. To bring this new family together, Brian and Sarah build an irresistible treehouse village in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Tina and her husband Patrick have a home that is overrun with both baking supplies and soccer equipment. To extend this family's living space, Brian and Sarah turn their backyard into one part cake decorating studio and one part soccer field.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Ali and Hana have two very talented young children - and a very noisy and crowded house. To give everyone in this family their own space, Brian and Sarah turn an old garage into a kids' music and arts hangout.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Craig and Claudia share their new space with Craig's brother, Craig's parents - and their two massive dogs. To give these new homeowners a place of their own, Brian and Sarah build a sports bar and entertainment hangout in their backyard.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Love is large but space is tight for Lara & Mike and their 5 children. Brian and Sarah free up space by building an activity-packed tree house and recreation court for the children, with grilling, dining and lounging areas for the whole family.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Aarati & Dave both work from home, forcing their living room to be a triple duty working/living/childrens' play area. Brian and Sarah create a flexible structure, install a sleek and sophisticated plunge pool, and create an outdoor fireplace lounge.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Couple Farzana & Reyan have maxed out all living space in their city-sized bungalow, leaving no room for Reyan's at-home stained glass business or Farzana's writing. Brian and Sarah build Reyan a spacious studio and construct an inspiring deck area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Brian and Sarah create a backyard for Pam & Kevin that matches their lush forest surrounding complete with a double wrap around deck and a hot tub. The team also build a workshop for Kevin to perfect his craft of leather tooling.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.sub-title: A Space For Dancing and Hanging
programme.desc: Susan's energetic son, Harrison, has no space to dance at home without getting under his mom's feet. Brian and Sarah build a hang out / dance space for Harrison and create a California-inspired pool and lounge area for Susan.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Sandra & David's eldest daughter, Harlow, was born with vision challenges and their youngest daughter, Delilah, is just learning to walk. Brian and Sarah build a colorful playland for both children, while also building a decked out BBQ & dining area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Carly & Nate's social media star dog, Dean the Basset Hound, has a lot of four-legged friends visiting, leaving the home feeling cramped. Brian and Sarah make a bar/lounge for pet and owner gatherings, along with a stylish outdoor entertainment area.

programme.title: Backyard Builds
programme.desc: Breanna & Nick's life revolves around socializing and physical activity. Brian and Sarah convert an old, underused shed into a beautiful, zen'd out yoga studio and create backyard partying, lounging and dining areas.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: After going way over time and budget renovating the main floor of their century home, Jake and Lorraine have run out of steam and need Nicole and Caffery to take on the second floor before their fast-approaching wedding!

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Diane and Bernard are downsizing. They're counting on Nicole and Caffery to get them top dollar! And back in the city, Whitney is struggling to make her townhouse function properly. Nicole and Caffery bring their magic to transform this townhouse!

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffery transform a townhouse into an absolute dream for Nicole and her two daughters, while helping real estate pro Chris uncover and stage this cluttered suburban listing.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Ashley and Colin can't wait to see how Nicole and Caffery transform Ashely's grandmother's dated bungalow into their new, modern, family home; and Caffery gets Nicole on board with giving his good friend Marlene a much-needed refresh of her home.

programme.title: Styled
programme.desc: Nicole and Caffery bring all the moody design vibes to their first speakeasy lounge for game enthusiasts Krysti and Dana; while real estate agent Natalie's compact condo listing needs staging help to spark it into a luxe and warm downtown home.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Scott, Lisa and their 12-year-old son Archie live in a rented house in the suburbs with no space and individuality that they desire from a home. Instead the family has ordered their new home from a specialist log construction company.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Bill and Sukie Barber have decided to build a new house in one of their fields using primarily locally sourced materials to fit with their sustainable lifestyle: an ambitious remit in such a secluded corner of the Borders.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: This episode follows a fear-less single mother pioneering a brand new, beehive-inspired 'kit' home on her seriously steep plot in the picture-perfect Tamar Valley.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: Steve Langstone and his wife Sharon found their perfect plot in some ancient woodland on the side of a lake, where they wanted to construct a home. They found an innovative company that specializes in constructing homes that are technically moveable.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: While on holiday in the Outer Hebrides, Ruth Hamilton and John Henry fell in love with the isolated wilderness of the Isle of Harris. To make their new home possible, the couple found an innovative construction company, who specialize in kit houses.

programme.title: Impossible Builds

programme.desc: Sham, Ruban and their twin boys aren't using their big, boring backyard. To help this family embrace the great outdoors, Brian and Sarah build a vacation style getaway, with a beach volleyball court and a kid's clubhouse.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Mamma Mia! Off We Go Again
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Go Greek! Clash of the Titans

programme.desc: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger visit Galveston, Texas, and stay at the iconic Tremont House; the two get shown around the waters off the coast by local guide Capt. Brian Wilson.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger continue their Galveston adventure with local guide Capt. Brian Wilson; this time they're hunting big red snapper off the coast.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.sub-title: Triple Tail in the Florida Bay
programme.desc: Taking off from the Hawks Cay Resort, Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger head out into the Florida Bay to target triple tails; these bulky fish are built like tanks and fight hard.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: High winds and big seas can't stop Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger from targeting tuna at the West Hump of the coast of the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Being consistently productive on the water means knowing how to adapt to conditions; Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger switch it up and fish shallow for sailfish.

programme.title: Into the Blue

programme.title: Local Lines
programme.desc: Capt. Brandon Branch takes one of his buddies from Diamond Fishing Products out for some shallow grouper action in Crystal River, Fla.; this style of fishing is becoming more popular and provides trophy-quality fish in less than ten feet of water.

programme.sub-title: On Deck With Chris Davison Of The Historic Island Inn

programme.title: LBP Spotlight
programme.desc: Meet Captain Lionel James, a respected Destin, Florida guide known for his upbeat personality, strong community ties, and love for fitness when he's not on the water.

programme.desc: U.S. Army veteran Carlos Powell tells of family sacrifice and fighting his post-service demons.

programme.title: The Cast
programme.desc: The Cast aims to reveal various angling experiences tied to a deeper meaning through the lens of personal experiences; from fresh water in the Midwest, to exploring the saltwater of the coasts.

programme.title: Sportsman's Journal

programme.title: Ship Shape TV

programme.desc: Capt Justin Leake goes back to his roots as a mate on a sportfisher and heads offshore with a group of old and new friends; they fight yellowfin tuna, marlin and monster mahi-mahi in perfect December weather on the gulf.

programme.desc: Captain Mike heads to the sweetwater for some pad flippin' and lip rippin'.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.sub-title: North American Deer Slam: Last Day in Mexico
programme.desc: It's Mark Peterson's third day in Mexico hunting for a Mexican Texanus whitetail; after bagging two bucks in two days with his Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC, he now moves to a new farm where a 12-point buck has often been seen in the property.
